assertions.title: First Visit Experience
assertions.reason: Fresh-load experience showed the themed loading state, reached the ready board in 1.895s (<3s), and exposed all default controls without runtime errors.

steps.action: Open a fresh browser session at /
steps.expected: First-visit load begins and shows a loading state during WASM init
steps.observed: Loading copy 'Seasoning the walnut board' rendered in the warm Classic Wood theme by 1.505s.

steps.expected: Board and controls appear ready within 3 seconds
steps.observed: Ready view appeared in 1.895s with board, theme controls, difficulty controls, move history, captured pieces, and evaluation panel visible.
`agent-browser errors` returned no errors after load and follow-up interactions.

assertions.title: Board Renders with All Pieces in Starting Position
assertions.reason: The ready board rendered as an 8x8 grid with 64 squares, all 32 pieces in standard starting positions, coordinate labels visible, and White oriented at the bottom.

steps.action: Inspect the ready board on first load
steps.expected: Alternating 8x8 board and starting position pieces render
steps.observed: DOM inspection found 64 square buttons, 32 piece buttons, 16 white pieces, and 16 black pieces.

steps.expected: Black pieces at rank 8, white pieces at rank 1, files/ranks visible
steps.observed: `black rook on a8` and `white rook on h1` were present, screenshot shows files a-h and ranks 1-8, and White is at the bottom.

assertions.title: Premium Elegant Aesthetics
assertions.reason: The UI presents a cohesive premium look with custom serif/sans typography, layered gradients, rounded panels, and shadowed controls rather than browser-default styling.

steps.expected: Polished premium styling with custom surfaces and typography
steps.observed: Screenshots show coordinated wood-toned panels, rounded cards, inset borders, and a balanced editorial layout.

steps.expected: Custom fonts and surface treatments are applied
steps.observed: Heading uses Playfair Display at 40px; the main surface uses layered radial/linear gradients; buttons use 19.2px radius, inset borders, shadows, and a custom gradient background.

steps.action: Check for browser-default form styling and runtime diagnostics
steps.expected: No default controls visible and no console errors
steps.observed: DOM contained 0 input/select/textarea elements in the tested view and `agent-browser errors` returned no errors.

assertions.title: Responsive Layout
assertions.reason: At both tested desktop and tablet viewports the board stayed perfectly square, the page avoided horizontal overflow, and all controls remained accessible.

steps.action: Set viewport to 1920x1080 and inspect layout
steps.expected: Board fills desktop space appropriately without distortion or horizontal scrolling
steps.observed: Board measured 703.2x703.2px and document scrollWidth matched viewport width (1920).

steps.action: Set viewport to 768x1024 and inspect layout
steps.expected: Board remains square and controls stay accessible on tablet
steps.observed: Board measured 700.3x700.3px, controls stacked above/below the board accessibly, and document scrollWidth matched viewport width (768).

steps.expected: No horizontal clipping and no console errors
steps.observed: Screenshots show complete controls at both sizes and `agent-browser errors` returned no errors.

assertions.title: Loading State
assertions.reason: A theme-matched loading screen appeared during WASM initialization, then cleared once the engine was ready; afterward the board accepted a piece click, confirming interactivity.

steps.action: Open the app from a fresh isolated session
steps.expected: Themed loading indicator appears while the engine initializes
steps.observed: Warm brown loading screen with the message 'Seasoning the walnut board' appeared before the board rendered.

steps.action: Wait for the app to become ready
steps.expected: Loading indicator disappears and board becomes interactive
steps.observed: Loading text cleared by 1.895s; the ready board rendered and a click on the white pawn at e2 succeeded after initialization.

frictions.description: On occupied squares, the piece button overlays the square button in the accessibility tree, so verifying post-load interactivity required clicking the piece ref (`white pawn on e2`) rather than the underlying square ref.
frictions.resolution: Used the piece button ref from an annotated screenshot to confirm the board accepted interaction after initialization.

summary: Tested 5 assigned website assertions in a fresh browser session: all 5 passed. Initial load reached a ready board in 1.895s with no console errors, the starting board rendered correctly, premium styling was evident, responsive behavior held at desktop and tablet sizes, and the themed loading state cleared before the board became interactive.
